$comment: San Diego County event sources. Compiled from a 77-source curated list across 11 categories. The strongest sources are 12 confirmed WordPress + The Events Calendar (Tribe) installs (ica-sd, madhouse-comedy, pacific-beach, pechanga-arena, sd-tech-scene, sdmart, shouse, startup-sd, tcs-rockets, balboa-park, north-park-ms, sd-chamber) plus Casbah on See Tickets (62 events on the homepage). Ticketmaster-backed venues (Belly Up, Humphreys, Observatory North Park, Rady Shell, SD Symphony, The Sound, SD Wave, SD FC, SD Gulls) use the ticketmaster adapter and need TICKETMASTER_API_KEY. Squarespace and Drupal sites land on html-generic best-effort. Sources known to be bot-blocked, AXS-backed (no adapter yet), or Shopify storefronts without a calendar are disabled.

sources.name: San Diego Tourism Authority
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] Cloudflare 403 to all non-browser UAs (retried with Safari UA — still 403). Official DMO calendar covers major cultural/recreational/festival events region-wide. DISABLED until a custom adapter or headless browser proxy lands.

sources.name: City of San Diego — Events Calendar
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] Drupal-based. No Tribe/MEC/CivicPlus RSS surfaces detected. Municipal calendar of city-sponsored and permitted public events. html-generic best-effort; revisit if 0.

sources.name: San Diego Reader — Events
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] Webflow site behind Cloudflare. Alternative newsweekly with comprehensive searchable listings across all categories. html-generic best-effort — revisit for a custom adapter if signal is high.

sources.name: San Diego Magazine — Community Events
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] WordPress, no Tribe REST. Lifestyle magazine community calendar. html-generic best-effort.

sources.name: KPBS Events
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] Custom CMS with Ticketmaster widget references. Public media events calendar focused on arts/culture/community. html-generic best-effort.

sources.name: Daylight San Diego
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] Custom site, no fingerprint detected, no Tribe REST. Neighborhood-focused local happenings. html-generic best-effort.

sources.name: MyCityScene San Diego
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] Custom platform, no obvious fingerprint. Local event discovery covering arts/food/music/nightlife. html-generic best-effort.

sources.name: Eventbrite — San Diego
sources.notes: DISABLED — the regional /d/ca--san-diego/events/ feed has no organizer ID, so the eventbrite adapter (organizer-scoped) cannot consume it directly. Replace with one entry per organizer once we identify the top SD organizers. Requires EVENTBRITE_TOKEN.

sources.name: Do San Diego (DOSD)
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] Aggregator with embedded Eventbrite/See Tickets/Ticketmaster widgets. No clean upstream REST. html-generic best-effort; revisit if a single embedded organizer dominates.

sources.name: SD Tech Scene
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] WordPress + The Events Calendar (Tribe) confirmed via /wp-json/tribe/events/v1/events. Real future-dated tech meetups and workshops returned. Strong source for SD's tech/startup ecosystem.

sources.name: Meetup — San Diego Networking
sources.notes: DISABLED — Meetup requires an API key (or per-group iCal URLs) for structured access. html-generic against the find/ search page won't extract anything useful. Replace with a custom meetup adapter or per-group iCal entries.

sources.name: San Diego Street Fairs
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] WordPress + Tribe confirmed, but the REST endpoint returns events:[] (total:0). Calendar appears unmaintained at the moment. DISABLED until the operator starts posting again — re-probe periodically.

sources.name: 19hz — San Diego Electronic Music
sources.notes: DISABLED — 3KB JS-only landing page; the SD listings are loaded client-side via JS that html-generic cannot execute. Electronic/EDM/underground dance database. Revisit with a headless adapter or scraping the city-specific .html endpoint if discoverable.

sources.name: La Jolla Playhouse
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] WordPress, no Tribe REST. Tony Award-winning regional theater on the UCSD campus, known for world-premieres. html-generic best-effort.

sources.name: The Old Globe Theatre
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] Custom CMS behind Cloudflare, no Tribe/wp-json. Acclaimed Balboa Park repertory theater; one of the oldest professional theaters in the US. html-generic best-effort.

sources.name: San Diego Theatres (Civic + California Center)
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] Tiny (~14KB) custom site, no fingerprint. Nonprofit operator of Civic Theatre + California Center for the Arts; presents Broadway tours. html-generic best-effort.

sources.name: San Diego Symphony
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] Custom site with Ticketmaster ticketing. Premier orchestral organization with year-round classical, pops, and special concerts. Switched to ticketmaster adapter; requires TICKETMASTER_API_KEY. Look up venueId via /discovery/v2/venues?keyword=San+Diego+Symphony and replace keyword below with venueId.

sources.name: The Rady Shell at Jacobs Park
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] Custom site with Ticketmaster ticketing. Outdoor waterfront amphitheater operated by SD Symphony — summer concert destination on the bay. Switched to ticketmaster adapter; requires TICKETMASTER_API_KEY. Look up venueId via /discovery/v2/venues?keyword=Rady+Shell and replace keyword below with venueId.

sources.name: The Comedy Store La Jolla
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] Custom site, no Tribe REST. La Jolla outpost of the legendary West Coast comedy club. html-generic best-effort.

sources.name: American Comedy Co.
sources.notes: DISABLED — Shopify storefront, no calendar surface detected. Gaslamp Quarter stand-up + improv club. Revisit if they expose a /events or /shows page with JSON-LD.

sources.name: Madhouse Comedy Club
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] WordPress + Tribe confirmed. Real future-dated open mics and stand-up shows returned. Solid auto-ingest candidate.

sources.name: National Comedy Theatre
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] WordPress, no Tribe REST. Long-running improv theater offering interactive shows and classes. html-generic best-effort.

sources.name: Mic Drop Comedy
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] Custom site, no fingerprint. Local production company + venue hosting stand-up showcases across SD. html-generic best-effort.

sources.name: The Casbah
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] WordPress + See Tickets plugin confirmed. 62 .seetickets-list-event-container blocks on the homepage. Iconic Mission Hills indie rock venue since 1989. Same adapter that handles Pappy & Harriet's (built at coachella commit 8298078).

sources.name: Soda Bar
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe + follow-up] WordPress, no Tribe REST. /shows/ 404s; events render on homepage. Mid-size City Heights indie music venue. html-generic best-effort against /.

sources.name: Observatory North Park
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] Ticketmaster-backed site, no on-page event REST. Mid-capacity multi-room music hall (rock/pop/EDM/hip-hop). Switched to ticketmaster adapter; requires TICKETMASTER_API_KEY. Look up venueId via /discovery/v2/venues?keyword=Observatory+North+Park and replace keyword below with venueId.

sources.name: Music Box SD
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] WordPress, no Tribe REST. Versatile Barrio Logan music venue. html-generic best-effort.

sources.name: Belly Up Tavern
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] WordPress site without a Tribe REST surface, but every event card links to ticketmaster.com/event/<id>. Beloved Solana Beach club with eclectic programming (rock/jazz/world). Switched to ticketmaster adapter; requires TICKETMASTER_API_KEY. Look up venueId via /discovery/v2/venues?keyword=Belly+Up&stateCode=CA and replace keyword below with venueId.

sources.name: Humphrey's Concerts by the Bay
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] Cloudflare-fronted, Ticketmaster ticketing. Scenic outdoor waterfront amphitheater on Shelter Island — summer-only series. Requires TICKETMASTER_API_KEY. Look up venueId via /discovery/v2/venues?keyword=Humphreys&stateCode=CA and replace keyword below with venueId.

sources.name: The Sound
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] WordPress site with Ticketmaster ticketing. Downtown San Diego music venue and bar. Switched to ticketmaster adapter; requires TICKETMASTER_API_KEY. Look up venueId via /discovery/v2/venues?keyword=The+Sound+San+Diego and replace keyword below with venueId.

sources.name: The Shout House
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] WordPress + Tribe confirmed. Future-dated dueling pianos / live music shows returned. Gaslamp Quarter dueling-piano bar (the spreadsheet typo'd 'The Shouse' but the actual venue is The Shout House).

sources.name: Nova SD
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] WordPress with embedded Eventbrite widgets. No native Tribe REST. Electronic music-focused nightclub. html-generic best-effort; revisit if a single dominant Eventbrite organizer ID becomes clear.

sources.name: Spin Nightclub
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] WordPress + embedded Eventbrite/Shopify. No Tribe REST. Popular Hillcrest LGBTQ+ nightclub with DJ programming. html-generic best-effort.

sources.name: Parq Nightclub
sources.notes: DISABLED — main site links out to wl.seetickets.us/parq for tickets, but the events page on parqsd.com itself surfaces no event blocks. Try seetickets-list against https://wl.seetickets.us/parq directly in a follow-up; until then html-generic yields nothing.

sources.name: The Onyx Room
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] WordPress, no Tribe REST. Underground Gaslamp club focused on house/techno/electronic. html-generic best-effort.

sources.name: San Diego Museum Council
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] WordPress, no Tribe REST. Umbrella organization for 30+ Balboa Park museums; aggregates exhibitions and cultural events. html-generic best-effort.

sources.name: Balboa Park
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] WordPress + Tribe confirmed via REST. 1,200-acre cultural park housing 17 museums, performing arts venues, gardens. Likely the single richest source of Balboa Park-area events.

sources.name: San Diego Natural History Museum (The Nat)
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] Custom CMS behind Cloudflare, no Tribe REST. Natural history museum in Balboa Park (films, exhibitions, education). html-generic best-effort — likely overlap with balboa-park.

sources.name: San Diego Museum of Art
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] WordPress + Tribe confirmed. Largest visual art museum in the region, presenting major exhibitions and community events.

sources.name: Institute of Contemporary Art San Diego (ICA)
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] WordPress + Tribe confirmed via REST despite a wixsite reference in markup (probably an embedded widget). Contemporary art museum with galleries in La Jolla and downtown.

config.defaultVenue: Institute of Contemporary Art San Diego

sources.name: Gaslamp Quarter Association
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] Drupal core with embedded Squarespace/Eventbrite/Shopify widgets behind Cloudflare. BID for SD's historic entertainment district (Taste of Gaslamp, seasonal events). html-generic best-effort.

sources.name: Little Italy Association
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] Custom site, no fingerprint. BID for Little Italy (Arrivederci festival, Farmers Market, street events). html-generic best-effort.

sources.name: Hillcrest Business Improvement Association
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe + follow-up] Squarespace site but no /events collection (returns 404). Content is bespoke pages — /pride-promenade, /openhouse, /freetomembers. BID for the Hillcrest LGBTQ+ hub. DISABLED until an events collection slug is identified or a custom parser of their bespoke pages is built.

sources.name: North Park Main Street
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] WordPress + Tribe confirmed via REST. BID for North Park (arts/craft beer/live music). Real future events returned.

sources.name: Adams Avenue Business Association
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] WordPress, no Tribe REST despite cloudflare/wp-json fingerprint. BID for Adams Avenue corridor in Normal Heights (Adams Avenue Street Fair). html-generic best-effort.

sources.name: Pacific Beach Business Association
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] WordPress + Tribe confirmed via REST. BID representing the Pacific Beach community.

sources.name: Ocean Beach Business Improvement District
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] Drupal-based with /node/ URL pattern. BID for Ocean Beach (OB Farmers Market, community events). html-generic best-effort.

sources.name: La Jolla Village Merchants Association
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] WordPress with embedded Eventbrite. No Tribe REST. BID for La Jolla village (Art & Wine Festival, seasonal events). html-generic best-effort.

sources.name: Encinitas 101 Main Street Association
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] Squarespace-hosted. BID for Encinitas coastal town (street fairs, markets, community events). squarespace-events adapter targets /events/.

sources.name: Carlsbad Village Association
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] Custom site, no fingerprint. BID for historic Carlsbad Village (village festivals, community programming). html-generic best-effort.

sources.name: La Mesa Village Association
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] Custom HTML site (no WP/Tribe). BID for La Mesa Village (Oktoberfest, cruises, seasonal events). html-generic best-effort.

sources.name: San Diego Padres (MLB)
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] mlb.com schedule page is heavily JS-rendered; structured-data extraction is uncertain. MLB has its own JSON API but no adapter wired up. html-generic best-effort; if 0, consider manual one-off entries for major series.

sources.name: San Diego Wave FC (NWSL)
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] WordPress site with Ticketmaster ticketing for home games. NWSL team plays at Snapdragon Stadium. Switched to ticketmaster adapter; requires TICKETMASTER_API_KEY. Look up venueId via /discovery/v2/venues?keyword=Snapdragon and pin the keyword to 'San Diego Wave' to filter to home matches.

sources.name: San Diego FC (MLS)
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] Custom site with Ticketmaster ticketing. MLS expansion team playing at Snapdragon Stadium. Switched to ticketmaster adapter; requires TICKETMASTER_API_KEY. Look up venueId via /discovery/v2/venues?keyword=Snapdragon and replace keyword below with 'San Diego FC' or venueId.

sources.name: San Diego Gulls (AHL)
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] Tiny (~19KB) custom page, JS-rendered. AHL affiliate playing at Pechanga Arena. Switched to ticketmaster adapter; requires TICKETMASTER_API_KEY. Filter on 'San Diego Gulls' keyword.

sources.name: San Diego Seals (NLL)
sources.notes: DISABLED — site ticketing is AXS-only (no axs adapter in registry). NLL lacrosse at Pechanga Arena. Build an axs adapter or re-enable via ticketmaster if the schedule is also listed there.

sources.name: San Diego Legion (MLR)
sources.notes: DISABLED — Shopify storefront for merchandise; the actual schedule isn't surfaced here. Re-enable when a dedicated schedule URL with JSON-LD or RSS is identified.

sources.name: Snapdragon Stadium
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] Minimal (~11KB) landing page, JS-only. Multi-purpose stadium in Mission Valley hosting soccer + concerts. Switched to ticketmaster adapter for events broader than just FC/Wave home matches; requires TICKETMASTER_API_KEY. Look up venueId via /discovery/v2/venues?keyword=Snapdragon and replace keyword below with venueId.

sources.name: Pechanga Arena San Diego
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] WordPress + Tribe confirmed via REST despite AXS/Ticketmaster ticket links in markup. Real future-dated events returned (PFL San Diego etc.). Native Tribe is preferred over ticketmaster to avoid dedupe with other TM sources.

sources.name: Del Mar Thoroughbred Club
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] Custom site, no fingerprint. Historic horse racing track presenting live racing and special events (summer + fall meets). html-generic best-effort; likely needs a manual one-off entry for the meet windows.

sources.name: San Diego Regional Chamber of Commerce
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] WordPress + Tribe confirmed via REST. Networking events, forums, professional development.

sources.name: Startup San Diego
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] WordPress + Tribe confirmed. Real future-dated events including SDSU Angel Conference. Strong source for tech/startup community.

sources.name: Downtown San Diego Partnership
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] WordPress, no Tribe REST despite wp-content/wp-json fingerprint. BID for the downtown core (events, activations, programming). html-generic best-effort.

sources.name: SD Beer (San Diego Beer)
sources.notes: DISABLED — no fingerprint, ~63KB site (probably mostly content/blog). Craft beer guide for SD. Revisit if they expose an /events feed.

sources.name: San Diego Beer News
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] WordPress with embedded Eventbrite, no Tribe REST. News + events for SD's craft beer industry. html-generic best-effort.

sources.name: King of Happy Hour San Diego
sources.notes: DISABLED — content is recurring happy-hour listings (not dated events). Not a good fit for an event ingest. Re-enable if they start a one-off events section.

sources.name: Happy Hours in PB
sources.notes: DISABLED — same reason as king-of-hh: recurring happy-hour content, not dated events.

sources.name: Sunset Trivia
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] Custom Cloudflare-fronted site, no fingerprint. Pub trivia company running weekly trivia nights at SD venues. html-generic best-effort — many of these may be recurring.

sources.name: Game Night Live San Diego
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] WordPress, no Tribe REST. Live game show events at SD bars/restaurants. html-generic best-effort.

sources.name: Trivia Goat
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] WordPress, no Tribe REST. Trivia company hosting weekly events at SD venues. html-generic best-effort.

sources.name: Geeks Who Drink
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] WordPress, no Tribe REST. National pub quiz company with SD venues. html-generic best-effort — may need a city filter on their venue locator.

sources.name: San Diego Craft Board Games
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] WordPress with embedded wix.com widget. Board game community + events. html-generic best-effort.

sources.name: Off the Shelf Games
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] WordPress, no Tribe REST. Board game café + events space (game nights, tournaments). html-generic best-effort.

sources.name: Game Empire San Diego
sources.notes: DISABLED — kemo bot-challenge on a tiny (~8KB) Shopify storefront; no calendar surface to ingest. Premier SD board game / hobby store. Re-enable if they add a /events page accessible to bots.

sources.name: Bards & Cards
sources.notes: DISABLED — Shopify storefront behind kemo bot-challenge. Game café + event venue (card games, RPGs, social events). Re-enable if they expose a separate scheduling URL.

sources.name: TCS Rockets
sources.notes: [2026-05-27 probe] WordPress + Tribe confirmed via REST. SD gaming + social events organization (Casual Commander etc.).

sources.name: On-Board Gaming
sources.notes: DISABLED — large (~3MB) Shopify storefront behind kemo + Cloudflare; no calendar surface. Board game community in SD. Re-enable when an event endpoint is identified.

sources.name: San Diego one-off events (manual)
sources.notes: Specific dated events curated by hand in config/regions/sandiego/one-off.json. Use for Padres home stands, Del Mar racing meets, Comic-Con dates, and any venue that can't be auto-scraped.
